title: MnemoVault — Ollama-backed local wiki IDE
body_markdown:
## MnemoVault — Ollama-backed local wiki IDE

Worth watching. Runs the full stack locally — Ollama as backend, a
desktop app as the IDE. Zero API cost.

Blockers for me to adopt it directly:
- Opinionated on wiki shape in ways that don't match my catalog
- No Evernote ingestion path
- Mobile story unclear

But the architecture is instructive — same general idea as en2karp
Pipeline 02, packaged as an app.
